summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HomesteadHub Comments feature. All backend API endpoints working correctly. Fixed critical bug where comments were showing encrypted content in the feed. All 16 backend tests pass, frontend UI tested and working.

fixed.issue: Comments content was not being decrypted when fetching posts list
fixed.fix: Added decryption loop for comments in get_posts endpoint (server.py lines 365-370)

passed_tests: DELETE authorization - Post owner can delete any comment
DELETE authorization - Non-owner cannot delete others' comments (403)
Comment encryption/decryption with special characters and unicode
Comments included in posts list response
Frontend comment toggle button - expand/collapse working
Frontend comment input - typing and submitting working
Frontend comment display - shows name, timestamp, content
Frontend comment delete button - appears on hover, deletion working
Authentication required for all comment endpoints (401 for unauthenticated)
critical_code_review_comments: Empty comment content is allowed - consider adding validation to reject empty/whitespace-only comments
WebSocket connection still failing on page load (pre-existing issue from iteration 1)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added comment decryption in GET /api/posts endpoint
seed_data_creation: Test posts and comments created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comments feature fully tested and working. Bug fixed where GET /api/posts was not decrypting comment content. All CRUD operations for comments verified. Authorization logic (comment owner or post owner can delete) tested and working.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Comments showing encrypted content in feed
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: GET /api/posts endpoint was decrypting post descriptions but not comment content within the comments array
reproduction_steps: 3. Add a comment to the post
4. Refresh the page or navigate away and back
5. Expand comments - encrypted string visible instead of comment text
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added decryption loop for comments in get_posts endpoint (lines 365-370 in server.py)
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested via Playwright - comments now show decrypted content
